chunks.title: Making the Ephod and Shoulder Stones
chunks.reason: Describes the creation of the ephod and the placement of the onyx stones.

chunks.title: Making the Breastpiece
chunks.reason: Details the construction of the breastpiece, its stones, chains, and attachment to the ephod.

chunks.title: Making the Robe and Priestly Headgear
chunks.reason: Covers the robe with pomegranates and bells, tunics, and the golden plate for the turban.

chunks.title: Inventory of Tabernacle Furnishings
chunks.reason: Lists all the completed items brought to Moses including the tent, ark, altar, and garments.

chunks.title: Completion and Blessing
chunks.reason: Summarizes the completion of the work according to command and Moses' blessing.
